query: how to reset a frozen iphone

text_blocks.snippet: To unfreeze an iPhone, perform a force restart, which safely reboots the device without erasing your data.
For most modern iPhones (iPhone 8 and newer):

list.snippet: Press and quickly release the Volume Up button.
Press and quickly release the Volume Down button.
Press and hold the Side (Power) button until the screen goes black and the Apple logo appears (usually takes 10–15 seconds), then release the button.

text_blocks.snippet: For a clear visual guide on exactly how fast you need to press the buttons to get your phone to restart:
If your specific model is older, the process varies slightly:

list.snippet: iPhone 7: Press and hold the Volume Down and Sleep/Wake buttons together until the Apple logo appears.
Older models with a Home button: Press and hold the Home and Sleep/Wake buttons simultaneously until the Apple logo appears.

text_blocks.snippet: If your phone still won't respond, charge it for at least 30 to 60 minutes and try again. For more detailed troubleshooting, check out the Apple Support Guide.

extracted.summary:
To unfreeze an iPhone, perform a **force restart** , which safely reboots the device without erasing your data.[](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=cTtHbP7X82c) [[1]](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=cTtHbP7X82c)[[2]](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=4rel9lOwAII&t=9)

For most modern iPhones (iPhone 8 and newer):

1. Press and quickly release the **Volume Up** button.
2. Press and quickly release the **Volume Down** button.
3. Press and hold the **Side (Power) button** until the screen goes black and the Apple logo appears (usually takes 10–15 seconds), then release the button.[](https://support.apple.com/guide/iphone/force-restart-iphone-iph8903c3ee6/ios) [[1]](https://support.apple.com/guide/iphone/force-restart-iphone-iph8903c3ee6/ios)[[2]](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=cTtHbP7X82c)[[3]](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Hla7j5ZVHU4)[[4]](https://www.youtube.com/shorts/h6j6IRElxmQ)[[5]](https://www.youtube.com/shorts/Smx0AXXojiI)

For a clear visual guide on exactly how fast you need to press the buttons to get your phone to restart:![Related video thumbnail](https://api.dataforseo.com/cdn/i/07210055-2120-0139-0000-7974ab7c9a1a:4)
1:59[How To Force Restart iPhone 52K views  · 10 months ago![](https://api.dataforseo.com/cdn/i/07210055-2120-0139-0000-7974ab7c9a1a:5)
YouTube · Technomentary](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=oHKYYbaXaAU) 

If your specific model is older, the process varies slightly:

- **iPhone 7:** Press and hold the **Volume Down** and **Sleep/Wake** buttons together until the Apple logo appears.
- **Older models with a Home button:** Press and hold the **Home** and **Sleep/Wake** buttons simultaneously until the Apple logo appears.[](https://www.cnet.com/tech/mobile/unresponsive-iphone-how-to-force-restart-or-reset-your-device/) [[1]](https://www.cnet.com/tech/mobile/unresponsive-iphone-how-to-force-restart-or-reset-your-device/)

If your phone still won't respond, charge it for at least 30 to 60 minutes and try again. For more detailed troubleshooting, check out the [Apple Support Guide](https://support.apple.com/guide/iphone/force-restart-iphone-iph8903c3ee6/ios).[[1]](https://techcommunity.microsoft.com/discussions/windowsinsiderprogram/my-iphone-screen-frozen-how-can-i-unfreeze-an-unresponsive-iphone/4513252)[[2]](https://support.apple.com/guide/iphone/force-restart-iphone-iph8903c3ee6/ios)
